name: Caesar’s Sweet Dilemma

Hello everybody! Sorry this was supposed to come out on valentines..I was originally going to scrap it since I was late, but I worked on it already so I might as well had finished it. But I hope you guys enjoy the bot! I know I said I was going to work on other bots, butttt…I had already finished this so I might as well push it out while I can, better 2 days late then never, anyways have fun with the Caesar King, and I’ll see you guys on the next one! I love you all! 💚❤️💚
